title: [MTR4] NS & SKPL DM'90
description: NS and SKPL retextures of the DM'90 / Class 134 from the PäRail Trains Addon
body:
This pack adds the NS DM'90, a retexture of Aecth the Dragon's Class 134.

This train comes in the original NS livery, but also in its later paint schemes after some sets were sold to polish rail operator SKPL.

It also contains the now well-known DM90 soundbase, finally on the train it was made after!
